eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 7 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 7 requirement

eligibility.label: Must have a Canadian post-secondary degree from an Alberta institution
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have completed a post-secondary degree at an Alberta institution

eligibility.label: Must have an operating business in Alberta for at least 6 months
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have an operating business in Alberta for at least 6 months

eligibility.label: Must be a recent graduate
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must be a recent graduate from an Alberta post-secondary institution
